meaning: n.闪烁发光物(尤指烟火),<口> 宝石
examples: So how did Toth land on the special sparkler?
This semi-dry sparkler has a refined aroma that conquers hearts, especially that of women.
Shulman, an actor and jewellery designer, collaborated with Kwiat Heritage Jewels to create the sparkler.
Within three years of planting, Gruet Winery was producing a high-quality sparkler that undersold rivals, mainly from California, by 25%.
Never one to take my own word for it, I asked a few friends to try this sparkler as well.
